description: Complete VPS deployment setup for esdata production environment

userStories.title: Fix backup service entrypoint for busybox compatibility
userStories.description: The backup service in docker-compose.prod.yml uses a multi-line entrypoint with pipefail which busybox sh doesn't support. Create a standalone backup.sh script and mount it as a volume.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/backup.sh with simple sh-compatible backup logic
Update docker-compose.prod.yml to use the script as entrypoint
Backup service starts and runs without errors
pg_dump runs successfully and creates .sql.gz files in /backups
userStories.notes: Already fixed locally, needs testing on VPS

userStories.title: Fix worker-boe-modelos import path resolution
userStories.description: The worker-boe-modelos container fails because runtime.py uses relative imports that don't work when executed as __main__. Change to absolute imports.
acceptanceCriteria: Change 'from .dead_letter import' to 'import dead_letter' in runtime.py
Use dead_letter.add_dead_letter() instead of add_dead_letter()
Worker starts and connects to database successfully
Worker runs sync loop without import errors
userStories.notes: Already fixed in code, needs rebuild and test on VPS

userStories.title: Fix dead_letter boolean comparison
userStories.description: The dead_letter.py query uses 'resolved = 0' but the column is BOOLEAN type. Change to resolved = False.
acceptanceCriteria: Change resolved = 0 to resolved = :resolved with resolved=False parameter
Worker-boe-modelos runs without SQL type errors
Dead letter entries can be created and queried correctly
userStories.notes: Already fixed in code, needs rebuild and test on VPS

userStories.title: Create sync_dead_letter table in production database
userStories.description: The sync_dead_letter table doesn't exist in the production database. Create it with the correct schema matching dead_letter.py expectations.
acceptanceCriteria: Table sync_dead_letter exists with all required columns
Indexes ix_dead_letter_worker_resolved and ix_dead_letter_last_failed created
Unique constraint on (worker_name, entity_id) works
Worker-boe-modelos can insert into the table without errors
userStories.notes: Already created manually on VPS, should be in alembic migration

userStories.title: Fix worker-cdi healthcheck timeout
userStories.description: Worker-cdi is unhealthy due to healthcheck timeout. The worker processes 86 conventions but the healthcheck expects a heartbeat file that may not be created for long-running workers.
acceptanceCriteria: Worker-cdi healthcheck passes (either fix healthcheck or ensure heartbeat file exists)
Worker continues running and syncing conventions
No restart loops for worker-cdi
userStories.notes: Worker is functional, only healthcheck is failing

userStories.title: Verify HTTPS and DNS for api.desuscribir.es and esdata.desuscribir.es
userStories.description: Confirm both domains resolve to the VPS IP and Caddy serves valid Let's Encrypt SSL certificates.
acceptanceCriteria: api.desuscribir.es resolves to 212.227.227.64
esdata.desuscribir.es resolves to 212.227.227.64
HTTPS returns valid response on api.desuscribir.es
HTTPS returns valid response on esdata.desuscribir.es
Caddy logs show successful certificate issuance

userStories.title: Install opencode on VPS and configure for autonomous deployment
userStories.description: Install opencode on the VPS, configure with user's API keys, and set up for autonomous deployment work.
acceptanceCriteria: opencode v0.0.55 installed on VPS at ~/go/bin/opencode
Config copied from local to /root/.config/opencode/opencode.json
Ripgrep and fzf installed for full opencode features
opencode can connect to Qwen 3.6 model via nan provider

userStories.title: Set up systemd timers for cron jobs
userStories.description: Install the systemd timer units from infra/deploy/systemd/ to schedule periodic data syncs on the VPS.
acceptanceCriteria: All timer units installed in /etc/systemd/system/
Timer units enabled and active
First scheduled runs execute successfully
Timer logs show successful executions
userStories.notes: Timer files exist in infra/deploy/systemd/ but not yet installed
